title: AI RAG Assistant
description: An enterprise-grade retrieval-augmented generation system designed to index complex documents and provide accurate answers with context citations. Features semantic embedding search, chunk overlap configurations, and vector search.

title: Stock Market Prediction
description: A machine learning project designed to analyze and predict profit and loss trends using the historical POWERGRID stock market dataset. Implements regression models and data preprocessing techniques.

title: Movie Recommendation System
description: A machine learning-based recommendation system that analyzes user preferences to suggest movies. Employs content-based filtering, cosine similarity, and a user-friendly Streamlit dashboard.

title: TrueShope
description: A full-featured responsive e-commerce web application. Focuses on containerized deployments, modern product catalogs, cart workflows, and microservice-ready backend APIs.

title: AI CyberSuit
description: An AI-driven cybersecurity platform designed to detect, analyze, and monitor cyber threats. Integrates 8 tools (Phishing Scanner, Malware Analysis, Network IDS, Behavioral Analytics, Email Security, Fraud Detection, Deepfake Scanner, and 0-Day Code Scanner) built with a React UI and Flask/FastAPI backend using Scikit-Learn models.

title: AI Resume Builder
description: An intelligent resume builder and ATS compatibility analyzer using Ollama and Mistral LLM for content recommendations, ATS score analysis, and resume strength check. Real-time feedback and secure resume data storage in MongoDB.

title: Brain Stroke Prediction
description: A health-tech Machine Learning web application that predicts brain stroke likelihood using demographic and clinical datasets. Supports single-patient and batch predictions via CSV processing, utilizing trained Random Forest or XGBoost classifiers.

title: Hybrid Cloud LLM Gateway
description: A sophisticated gateway for intelligently routing requests across multiple LLM providers. Optimizes performance and cost while maintaining high availability across cloud environments.
